title: Pan-Seared Barramundi with Japanese Tendon Sauce
description: A flavorful and healthy dish featuring pan-seared barramundi served with a rich Japanese tendon sauce.
instructions: 1. Preheat a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Season the barramundi fillets with salt and pepper.
3. Add 1 tablespoon of sesame oil to the skillet and sear the barramundi for 3-4 minutes on each side, or until cooked through.
4. Remove the barramundi from the skillet and set aside.
5. In the same skillet, add the remaining 1 tablespoon of sesame oil.
6. Add the grated ginger, minced garlic, and sliced green onions to the skillet and sauté for 1 minute, or until fragrant.
7. Add the Japanese tendon sauce to the skillet and stir to combine.
8. Return the barramundi to the skillet and spoon the tendon sauce over the top.
9. Garnish with roasted sesame seeds and serve immediately.
